nasb.text: Behold, while you are still there speaking with the king, I will come in after you and confirm your words.”

esv.text: Then while you are still speaking with the king, I also will come in after you and confirm your words.”

cnv.text: 你還在那裡與王說話的時候，我會隨後進來，證實你的話。”

ccb.text: 你跟王说话的时候，我会进去证实你的话。”
